testcase.name: postPaymentv4
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: { "result": [ { "Success": false, "Message": "A payment already exists with this Authorization Code." } ] } at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at testcase.name: gettPaymentNextv4
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"PreviousDocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000530","NextDocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000531"},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"PreviousDocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000528","NextDocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000529"},"Messages":[]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at
